name: scholarx
description: Research Publication Management System — MERN Stack

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "SERVER,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm start --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.start: concurrently --names "SERVER,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run start --prefix server" "npm start --prefix frontend"
